monitor_the_situation.title: — S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 40m ago. Iran's IRGC Navy bombed a vessel and warned other ships to only use routes approved by the Persian Gulf Strait Authority or face danger.
Iran Executes More Than 100 People in June Alone, Human Rights Group Claims
— S3 · Political · Iran · 47m ago. A human rights organization reports that Iran executed over 100 individuals in June 2026, highlighting a surge in state executions.
Trump Claims Iran Attack on Container Ship Violates Ceasefire
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1h ago. US President Trump says Iran's attack on a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz violates a ceasefire, citing a Memorandum of Understanding.
Qatar Condemns Targeting of Its LNG Tanker in Persian Gulf
